title: The Problem Solvers | Max Junestrand at Legora
summary: Legora is an AI-native operating system enabling legal teams to autonomously plan, execute, review, and complete complex legal work end-to-end. Built in partnership with Anthropic, it represents a strategic approach to leveraging model improvements for transformative capability in legal work rather than incremental gains.
